expectations.text: 輸出包含「主訴」區塊，且保留右側太陽穴、月經週期等描述
expectations.evidence: Has '一、主訴' with right temple and menstrual info

expectations.text: 輸出包含「診斷」區塊，提及肝血不足和肝陽上亢
expectations.evidence: Has '二、診斷' with both 肝血不足 and 肝陽上亢

expectations.text: 處方區塊保留所有藥名和劑量（天麻15g、鉤藤12g等）
expectations.evidence: Table contains all 11 herbs with dosages

expectations.text: 輸出包含「追蹤重點」區塊
輸出包含「疑問思考」區塊
最後有詢問使用者是否需要補充或調整的句子
expectations.evidence: File ends with clinical thoughts bullet points, no closing question to the user
